hero.headline: Find Verified Land Surveyors Near You
hero.subtext: Connect directly with licensed surveyors across India. Free for customers, no middlemen.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Enter your district to see all verified surveyors in your area.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Review experience, equipment, and license details side by side.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Call or WhatsApp the surveyor directly — no platform fees, ever.

cta.surveyorSubtext: List your profile for free and start receiving inquiries from customers across India.

footer.tagline: Connecting customers with verified land surveyors across India.

search.noResults: No surveyors found in {district}. Try a nearby district.

card.whatsappMessage: Hi, I found you on Booksurveyor.co and need a land survey in {district}

register.title: Register as a Surveyor
register.bioPlaceholder: Tell customers about your experience, specializations, and service areas... (max 300 chars)
register.declaration: I confirm that all details submitted are accurate and I am a licensed land surveyor.
register.successMessage: Your profile has been submitted for review. We will verify your license and activate your listing within 24 hours.
register.dragOrClick: Drag & drop or click to upload

dashboard.title: Your Dashboard
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.loginSubtext: Enter your registered phone number to receive an OTP.
dashboard.pendingBanner: Your profile is under review. You'll appear in search once approved.

errors.maxDistricts: You can select up to 5 districts
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
